parameters.query:
=SELECT 
  l.id,
  l.email,
  l.first_name,
  l.last_name,
  l.company,
  l.phone,
  l.ai_intent as service_type,
  l.ai_budget_signal as budget,
  l.proposal_content,
  l.created_at,
  '{{ $json.invoice_amount }}' as invoice_amount,
  '{{ $json.invoice_description }}' as invoice_description,
  '{{ $json.payment_terms }}' as payment_terms,
  '{{ $json.due_date }}' as due_date
FROM leads l
WHERE l.id = {{ $json.lead_id }};

parameters.jsCode:
// Generate invoice data const leadData = $input.item.json; const now = new Date(); const invoiceNumber = `HDS-${now.getFullYear()}${String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(leadData.id).padStart(5, '0')}`; // Calculate tax (assuming 8.5% sales tax) const subtotal = parseFloat(leadData.invoice_amount); const taxRate = 0.085; const taxAmount = subtotal * taxRate; const totalAmount = subtotal + taxAmount; // Format dates const invoiceDate = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); const dueDate = new Date(leadData.due_date).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); // Generate invoice HTML const invoiceHtml = `
Hudson Digital Solutions
hello@hudsondigitalsolutions.com
www.hudsondigitalsolutions.com
INVOICE
${invoiceNumber}
Date: ${invoiceDate}
Bill To
${leadData.first_name} ${leadData.last_name}
${leadData.company || ''}
${leadData.email}
${leadData.phone || ''}
Invoice Details
Invoice Date: ${invoiceDate}
Due Date: ${dueDate}
Payment Terms: ${leadData.payment_terms || 'Net 30'}
Service Type: ${leadData.service_type || 'Web Development'}
Description Quantity Rate Amount
${leadData.invoice_description} 1 $${subtotal.toLocaleString('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })} $${subtotal.toLocaleString('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}
Subtotal:
$${subtotal.toLocaleString('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}
Tax (8.5%):
$${taxAmount.toLocaleString('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}
Total:
$${totalAmount.toLocaleString('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}
Payment Instructions

Please make payment via bank transfer, check, or online payment portal.

Bank Transfer: [Bank details here]

Online Payment: Visit hudsondigitalsolutions.com/pay/${invoiceNumber.toLowerCase()}

Questions? Contact us at hello@hudsondigitalsolutions.com

Thank you for your business!

Hudson Digital Solutions | Professional Web Development & Automation Services

`; return { json: { lead_id: leadData.id, invoice_number: invoiceNumber, client_email: leadData.email, client_name: `${leadData.first_name} ${leadData.last_name}`, company: leadData.company, subtotal: subtotal, tax_amount: taxAmount, total_amount: totalAmount, invoice_date: invoiceDate, due_date: dueDate, payment_terms: leadData.payment_terms || 'Net 30', invoice_html: invoiceHtml } };

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO invoices (
  lead_id,
  invoice_number,
  invoice_date,
  due_date,
  subtotal,
  tax_amount,
  total_amount,
  payment_terms,
  status,
  created_at,
  updated_at
) VALUES (
  {{ $('Code: Generate Invoice HTML').item.json.lead_id }},
  '{{ $('Code: Generate Invoice HTML').item.json.invoice_number }}',
  NOW(),
  '{{ $('Postgres: Get Lead Details').item.json.due_date }}',
  {{ $('Code: Generate Invoice HTML').item.json.subtotal }},
  {{ $('Code: Generate Invoice HTML').item.json.tax_amount }},
  {{ $('Code: Generate Invoice HTML').item.json.total_amount }},
  '{{ $('Code: Generate Invoice HTML').item.json.payment_terms }}',
  'sent',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;
